items.title: Andy frontdesk conversational split and low-latency status
items.request: Front-facing Andy should respond conversationally with natural status and intake; separate coordinator behavior; avoid old-message backlog and ticket-heavy replies.
notes: 2026-03-03T07:38:21.792Z: Validated: npm run typecheck; happiness-gate PASS on conversational frontdesk/status flow after restart.

items.title: Worker probe request_id contract fix
items.request: Fix probe dispatch payload to satisfy andy-developer -> jarvis-worker request_id contract and remove false incident noise.
notes: 2026-03-03T07:12:39.677Z: Incident linkage: dispatch validator blocks from worker probe payload missing request_id.
2026-03-03T07:38:21.795Z: Probe payload now includes request_id; worker-2 probe now reaches review_requested. Remaining preflight flake tracked as incident-20260303T073709Z.

items.title: Stabilize Andy E2E gate timestamp ordering
items.request: Avoid false timeout when bot reply timestamp truncates to second and appears slightly before probe timestamp.
notes: 2026-03-03T07:38:30.947Z: Adjusted E2E timestamp tolerance; eliminated false timeout when reply timestamp truncates to whole second.

items.title: Parse latest valid completion block
items.request: When worker emits multiple completion blocks, choose latest valid block to avoid stale-branch failed_contract.
notes: 2026-03-03T07:47:23.374Z: Validated parser fix: vitest src/jarvis-worker-dispatch.test.ts pass (84 tests), focused worker-1 probe PASS review_requested (probe-jarvis-worker-1-1772523711-18103).
